#CSVIntervalData Tag Data
file_text = ''

#Source DataLake storage details
source_storage = 'cqldevdatahubsynapse' #Storage name
source_container = 'raw' #Storage container detail
source_path = 'AEMO/NEM12_temp' #internal folder location in container "demodata/demo_aemo"
source_file = 'mtrdl_mdymdp_toht_msg_0026283664.xml' #CUSTOMER__full_32a72bd2-bd94-467f-9030-6b9f20dad676_20240204_100201

#Destination DataLake storage details
destination_storage = 'cqldevdatahubsynapse' #Storage name
destination_container = 'bronze' #raw storage container details
destination_path = 'AEMO/NEM12_temp' #raw delta file patch

## Input Parameters example
source_storage = 'cqldevdatahubdata'
source_container = 'landing'
source_path = 'aemo'
source_file = 'NMI Sample File - NMI Removed.xml'
destination_storage = 'cqldevdatahubsynapse'
destination_container = 'raw'
destination_path = 'aemo'

extracted_text = f"{file_text}"
extracted_text = extracted_text.splitlines()
extracted_text = list(map(lambda x:(x.split(",")),extracted_text))

import xml.etree.ElementTree as et 
import pandas as pd
import csv
import datetime
from typing import List,Union,Dict



def break_into_groups(lines):
    groups = []
    subgroup = []
    interval_events = []
	
    #Block 200			   
    nmi = None
    nmi_configuration = None
    register_id = None
    nmi_suffix = None
    mdm_data_stream_identifier = None
    meter_serial_number = None
    unit_of_measurement = None
    interval_length = None
    next_scheduled_read_date = None
    record_500_data = None

    #Block 500
    trans_code = None
    ret_service_order = None
    read_datetime = None
    index_read = None
    """
    subgroup: {
            "data", "interval_events"
            }
    """
    file_metadata = None
    for line in lines:
        if line[0] == "100":
            file_metadata = line
        elif line[0] == "200": #Start a new group
            if len(subgroup) != 0:
																																						  
                block_200_metadata = [nmi,nmi_configuration,register_id,nmi_suffix,
                                      mdm_data_stream_identifier,meter_serial_number,unit_of_measurement,interval_length,next_scheduled_read_date]
                block_500_metadata =  [trans_code,ret_service_order,read_datetime,index_read]
                subgroup = [{"data":block_200_metadata + block_500_metadata + ls["data"],"interval_events":ls["interval_events"],"record_500_data": record_500_data } for ls in subgroup]
                groups.append(subgroup) # Append existing running group
                subgroup = [] # Create new group
                record_500_data = None
                trans_code = None
                ret_service_order = None
                read_datetime = None
                index_read = None
            interval_events = []
            nmi = line[RECORD_INDICATOR_200["NMI"]["Index"]]
            nmi_configuration = line[RECORD_INDICATOR_200["NMI_CONFIGURATION"]["Index"]]
            register_id = line[RECORD_INDICATOR_200["REGISTER_ID"]["Index"]]
            nmi_suffix = line[RECORD_INDICATOR_200["NMI_SUFFIX"]["Index"]]
            mdm_data_stream_identifier = line[RECORD_INDICATOR_200["MDM_DATA_STREAM_IDENTIFIER"]["Index"]]
            meter_serial_number = line[RECORD_INDICATOR_200["METER_SERIAL_NUMBER"]["Index"]]
            unit_of_measurement = line[RECORD_INDICATOR_200["UNIT_OF_MEASUREMENT"]["Index"]]
            interval_length = float(line[RECORD_INDICATOR_200["INTERVAL_LENGTH"]["Index"]])
            next_scheduled_read_date = line[RECORD_INDICATOR_200["NEXT_SCHEDULED_READ_DATE"]["Index"]]

        elif line[0] == "300":
            subgroup.append({"data":line,"interval_events":interval_events})
            interval_events = []
        elif line[0] == "400":
            interval_events.append({"beg_interval":line[1],"end_interval":line[2],"quality_method":line[3],"reason_code":line[4],"reason_description":line[5]})
        elif line[0] == "500":
            trans_code = line[RECORD_INDICATOR_500["TRANS_CODE"]["Index"]]
            ret_service_order = line[RECORD_INDICATOR_500["RET_SERVICE_ORDER"]["Index"]]
            read_datetime = line[RECORD_INDICATOR_500["READ_DATETIME"]["Index"]]
            index_read = line[RECORD_INDICATOR_500["INDEX_READ"]["Index"]]
        elif line[0] == "900": 
            if len(subgroup) != 0:																																		  
                block_200_metadata = [nmi,nmi_configuration,register_id,nmi_suffix,
                                      mdm_data_stream_identifier,meter_serial_number,unit_of_measurement,interval_length,next_scheduled_read_date]
                block_500_metadata =  [trans_code,ret_service_order,read_datetime,index_read]
                subgroup = [{"data":block_200_metadata + block_500_metadata + ls["data"],"interval_events":ls["interval_events"],"record_500_data": record_500_data } for ls in subgroup]
                groups.append(subgroup) # Append existing running group
    return groups,file_metadata

def combine_into_single_list(rows:List[List[List[str]]]):
    return [item for sublist in rows for item in sublist]


def generate_blocks_in_days(interval_length:int) -> int:
    blocks = TOTAL_MIN_IN_DAY / interval_length
    return int(blocks)


def generate_time_mapping_from_interval_length(interval_length,end:bool=False):
    mapping = {}
    blocks_in_day = generate_blocks_in_days(interval_length)
    # start_time = datetime.datetime.strptime(f"00:{int(interval_length):02}", "%H:%M")
    if not end:
        start_time = datetime.datetime.strptime(f"00:00", "%H:%M")
    else:
        start_time = datetime.datetime.strptime(f"00:{int(interval_length)}", "%H:%M")

    for i in range(blocks_in_day):
        time_str = start_time.strftime("%H:%M")
        mapping[i] = time_str
        start_time += datetime.timedelta(minutes=interval_length)

    return mapping


def generate_time_mapping_5min():
    mapping = {}
    start_time = datetime.datetime.strptime("00:00", "%H:%M")
    for i in range(FIVE_MIN_BLOCKS_IN_DAY):  # 0,...,287 -> 288 total intervals
        time_str = start_time.strftime("%I:%M%p").lower().lstrip("0")
        mapping[i] = time_str
        start_time += datetime.timedelta(minutes=5)
    return mapping

def generate_time_mapping_30min():
    mapping = {}
    start_time = datetime.datetime.strptime("00:00", "%H:%M")
    # 48 intervals for 30-minute intervals in a day
    for i in range(THIRTY_MIN_BLOCKS_IN_DAY): # 0,...,47 -> 48 total intervals
        time_str = start_time.strftime("%I:%M%p").lower().lstrip("0")
        mapping[i] = time_str
        start_time += datetime.timedelta(minutes=30)
    return mapping

def modify_values_with_interval_event_metadata(data):
    """ This is going to make values into: value | quality_method | reason_code | trans_code | rest_service_order | read_datetime | index_read """
    has_interval_events = False
    for item in data:
        for event in item["interval_events"]:
            has_interval_events = True if has_interval_events is False else has_interval_events
            beg_interval = int(event["beg_interval"]) + 14 # Because there are 14 columns that precede the value columns
            end_interval = int(event["end_interval"]) + 14
            quality_method = event["quality_method"]
            reason_code = event["reason_code"]
            cols_to_modify = [i for i in range(beg_interval,end_interval + 1)]
            for col in cols_to_modify:
                item["data"][col] = f"{item['data'][col]}|{quality_method}|{reason_code}"
    return [item["data"] for item in data],has_interval_events



def get_unique_interval_lengths(data) -> List[Union[float,int]]:
    interval_lengths = [d[7] for d in data]
    return list(set(interval_lengths))

import numpy as np 
class CleanData:
    file_metadata_index = {
            "RECORD_INDICATOR":0,
            "FILE_TYPE":1,
            "FILE_GENERATION_DATE":2,
            "COMPANY_THAT_SENT_DATA":3,
            "PARTICIPANT_ID":4}

    def __init__(self,df,interval_length,file_metadata) -> None:
        self.df = df
        self.interval_length = interval_length
        self.file_metadata = file_metadata
        self.time_mapping_start = generate_time_mapping_from_interval_length(self.interval_length)
        self.time_mapping_end = generate_time_mapping_from_interval_length(self.interval_length, True)


    def format(self,has_interval_events:bool) -> pd.DataFrame:
        index = self._generate_indices(self.interval_length)
        quality_method_index = index["QUALITY_METHOD"]
        reason_code_index = index["REASON_CODE"]
        reason_description_index = index["REASON_DESCRIPTION"]
        updated_datetime_index = index["UPDATED_DATETIME"]

        self.df.rename(columns={0:"NMI",1:"NMIConfiguration",2:"RegisterID",3:"NMISuffix",4:"MDMDataStreamIdentifier",
                                5:"MeterSerialNumber",6:"UnitOfMeasurementId",7:"IntervalLength",8:"NextScheduledReadDate",
                                9:"TransCodeId",10:"RetServiceOrder",11:"ReadDatetime",12:"IndexRead",
                                13:"RecordIndicator",14:"IntervalDate",
                                quality_method_index:"QualityMethodId",
                                reason_code_index:"ReasonCodeId",
                                reason_description_index:"ReasonDescription",
                                updated_datetime_index: "MSATSLoadDateTime"
                                },inplace=True)

        cols_to_melt = [col for col in self.df.columns if isinstance(col,int)]
        renamed_cols = {col:col - 15 for col in cols_to_melt }
						   
        self.df.rename(columns=renamed_cols,inplace=True)
        cols_to_drop = [col for col in self.df.columns if isinstance(col,int) and col > ( generate_blocks_in_days(self.interval_length)- 1)]
        self.df.drop(columns=cols_to_drop,inplace=True)
        self.df = self._add_file_metadata_cols()
        self.df = self.df.melt(id_vars=["NMI","NMIConfiguration","QualityMethodId","ReasonCodeId",
                                        "ReasonDescription",
                                        "RecordIndicator","RegisterID","NMISuffix","MDMDataStreamIdentifier","MeterSerialNumber",
                                        "UnitOfMeasurementId","IntervalLength","NextScheduledReadDate","VersionHeader","CreationDate","FromParticipant",
                                        "ToParticipant","IntervalDate","MSATSLoadDateTime","TransCodeId","RetServiceOrder","ReadDatetime","IndexRead"], var_name='Time', value_name='Value')
        if has_interval_events:
            try:
                #print(self.df["Value"])
                split_columns = self.df["Value"].str.split("|",expand=True)
                #print(split_columns)
                self.df[["Value","FinalQualityMethodId","FinalReasonCodeId"]] = split_columns
            except ValueError:
                self.df["FinalQualityMethodId"] = None
                self.df["FinalReasonCodeId"] = None
        else:
            self.df["FinalQualityMethodId"] = None
            self.df["FinalReasonCodeId"] = None

        indices_to_drop = self.df[(self.df["IntervalLength"] == self.interval_length ) & (self.df["Time"] > generate_blocks_in_days(self.interval_length) - 1)].index
        self.df.drop(indices_to_drop,inplace=True)
        self.df["Value"] = self.df["Value"].replace(r'^\s*$', np.nan, regex=True)
        self.df["Value"] = pd.to_numeric(self.df["Value"], errors='coerce')
        self.df["NormalizedTimeStart"] = self.df.apply(lambda x: self.time_mapping_start[x["Time"]], axis=1)
        self.df["NormalizedTimeEnd"] = self.df.apply(lambda x: self.time_mapping_end[x["Time"]], axis=1)
        self.df.sort_values(by=["IntervalDate","Time"],ascending=True,inplace=True)
        self._add_file_metadata_cols() # Adds metadata columns
        self.df.rename(columns={"Value":"Usage","Time":"IntervalIndex"},inplace=True)
        self._reorder_cols()
												 
        return self.df

    def _add_file_metadata_cols(self) -> pd.DataFrame:
        self.df["VersionHeader"] = self.file_metadata[self.file_metadata_index["FILE_TYPE"]]
        self.df["CreationDate"] = self.file_metadata[self.file_metadata_index["FILE_GENERATION_DATE"]]
        self.df["FromParticipant"] = self.file_metadata[self.file_metadata_index["COMPANY_THAT_SENT_DATA"]]
        self.df["ToParticipant"] = self.file_metadata[self.file_metadata_index["PARTICIPANT_ID"]]
        return self.df

    def _reorder_cols(self) -> pd.DataFrame:
        self.df = self.df[COLUMN_ORDER]


    @classmethod
    def _generate_indices(cls,interval_length):
        """

        Generates dynamic indices based on interval length.

        """
        blocks_in_day = TOTAL_MIN_IN_DAY / interval_length
        quality_method_index = blocks_in_day + 2 + NUMBER_OF_KEYS_IN_RECORD_200 +  NUMBER_OF_KEYS_IN_RECORD_500
        reason_code_index = quality_method_index + 1
        reason_description_index = reason_code_index + 1
        updated_datetime_index = reason_description_index + 1
        index = {
                "QUALITY_METHOD": int(quality_method_index),
                "REASON_CODE": int(reason_code_index) ,
                "REASON_DESCRIPTION": int(reason_description_index),
                "UPDATED_DATETIME": int(updated_datetime_index),
        }
        return index

combined_df = []
for il in interval_lengths: # When porting over to spark we can make this parallel 
    filtered_data = list(filter(lambda x: (x[(RECORD_INDICATOR_200["INTERVAL_LENGTH"]["Index"] - 1)] == il),data))
    df = pd.DataFrame(filtered_data)
    formatted_df = CleanData(df,il,file_metadata).format(has_interval_events)
    combined_df.append(formatted_df)
df_combined = pd.concat(combined_df)

# Enforce Schema

from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, StringType, IntegerType, BooleanType,DateType, DoubleType,TimestampType
landing_schema = StructType([
    StructField("VersionHeader",StringType(),True),
    StructField("CreationDate",StringType(),True),
    StructField("FromParticipant",StringType(),True),
    StructField("ToParticipant",StringType(),True),
    StructField("NMI",StringType(),True),
    StructField("NMIConfiguration",StringType(),True),
    StructField("RegisterID",StringType(),True),
    StructField("NMISuffix",StringType(),True),
    StructField("MDMDataStreamIdentifiers",StringType(),True),
    StructField("MeterSerialNumber",StringType(),True),
    StructField("UnitOfMeasurementId",StringType(),True),
    StructField("IntervalLength",DoubleType(),True),
    StructField("IntervalIndex",IntegerType(),False),
    StructField("IntervalDate",StringType(),True),
    StructField("NextScheduledReadDate",StringType(),True),
    StructField("Usage",DoubleType(),True),
    StructField("FinalQualityMethodId",StringType(),True),
    StructField("FinalReasonCodeId",StringType(),False),
    StructField("MSATSLoadDateTime",StringType(),True),
    StructField("QualityMethod",StringType(),True),
    StructField("ReasonCodeId",StringType(),True),
    StructField("ReasonDescription",StringType(),True),
    StructField("NormalizedTimeStart",StringType(),True),
    StructField("NormalizedTimeEnd",StringType(),True),
    StructField("TransCodeId",StringType(),True),
    StructField("RetServiceOrder",StringType(),True),
    StructField("ReadDatetime",StringType(),True),
    StructField("IndexRead",StringType(),True)

])

from pyspark.sql.functions import lit, current_timestamp,hash,col

# Add File Name
df = df.withColumn("FileName",lit(source_file))

# Start Interval Index at 1 
df = df.withColumn("IntervalIndex", col("IntervalIndex") + 1)

from pyspark.sql.functions import col, when
df = df.withColumn("FinalReasonCodeId", col("FinalReasonCodeId").cast(IntegerType()))
df = df.withColumn("FinalQualityMethodId", col("FinalQualityMethodId").cast(StringType()))
df = df.withColumn("TransCodeId", col("TransCodeId").cast(StringType()))
df = df.withColumn("RetServiceOrder", col("RetServiceOrder").cast(StringType()))
df = df.withColumn("ReadDatetime", col("ReadDatetime").cast(StringType()))
df = df.withColumn("IndexRead", col("IndexRead").cast(StringType()))
df = df.withColumn("Usage", col("Usage").cast(DoubleType()))

spark.sql("CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS aemo_bronze;")
spark.sql(f"""
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS aemo_bronze.nem12_raw_temp
USING delta
LOCATION 'abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/{destination_path}/nem12_raw_temp'
""")

from datetime import datetime
now = datetime.now()
current_datetime = now.strftime("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")
# output_path = f"abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/{destination_path}/nem12_raw_temp"
output_path = f"abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/{destination_path}/nem12_raw_temp"
df.write.format("delta").mode("append").option("mergeSchema","true").option("path", output_path).save()
